nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Rain before 4am, then snow. Cloudy, with a low around 33. Northeast wind around 16 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of 1 to 3 inches possible.

nws.detailedForecast: Snow before 8am, then rain showers and a chance of drizzle between 8am and 1pm, then areas of fog and a chance of rain showers and a chance of drizzle between 1pm and 4pm, then areas of fog and a chance of drizzle and a slight chance of rain showers. Cloudy, with a high near 34. Northeast wind 12 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of around one inch possible.
